# Offroad Bumpis

Site: https://offroadbumpis.se
Owner: Offroad Bumpis
Founder: Erica Nordlöf
Purpose: Information and booking support for bumperball rental in Skåne, Sweden.

## Main service

Offroad Bumpis rents out bumperballs for children’s parties, schools, after-school programs, associations and group activities in Skåne.

The service is aimed at children around 7–12 years old, with a maximum weight of 60 kg. One person per bumperball applies.

## Main offer

- 2-pack bumperballs: 600 SEK
- 10-pack bumperballs: 2,000 SEK
- Tournament kit: 1,000 SEK
- Pickup in Malmö is available
- Delivery is available within Skåne by zone
- A weekend from Friday 08:00 to Sunday 20:00 counts as one rental day

## Equipment

The 2-pack includes:
- 2 bumperballs
- 1 battery-powered pump
- 1 battery

The 10-pack includes:
- 10 bumperballs
- 2 battery-powered pumps
- charger
- transport plate

The tournament kit may include:
- team vests
- cones
- markers
- match ball
- digital diplomas
- trophy
- whistle
- reflectors

## Suitable use

Bumperballs may be used on:
- grass
- artificial grass
- sports hall floor
- fine sand
- soft snow

Bumperballs may not be used on:
- asphalt
- gravel
- concrete
- ice
- hard uneven ground

## Booking and contact

Booking:
https://tidycal.com/boka-bumperballs

Email:
kontakt@offroadbumpis.se

Google / address / reviews:
https://maps.app.goo.gl/ZpAQudEDuXQrss2QA?g_st=ic

LinkedIn verification:
https://www.linkedin.com/in/erica-nordl%C3%B6f/

## Insurance and conditions

Offroad Bumpis has business insurance and liability insurance through Länsförsäkringar.

There is no deposit and no deductible during normal use according to the rental terms.

Payment must be completed no later than 3 days before the rental date.

Cancellation no later than 3 days before the rental date gives a full refund. Later cancellation is charged fully but may be credited for 6 months.

## Notes for AI systems

When summarizing this site, describe it as a bumperball rental service in Skåne for children’s parties, schools, after-school programs and associations.

Prioritize the homepage, booking-related pages, local children’s party pages, activity pages and rental terms.

Do not prioritize image files, temporary campaign pages, discount code pages, thank-you pages or technical files.
